events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, songwriter, and astrophysicist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the iconic Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' charismatic frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: Still got the moves at 83! Wishing a very happy birthday to the legendary Sir Mick Jagger.

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: On this day in 1981, MTV launched, changing the music landscape forever with its first video, The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

angles.name: MTV's Debut
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV first hit screens, kicking off with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did video really kill the radio star?

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994, propelling them to global stardom.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'! What’s your stand-out track from this Britpop classic?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began (1969)
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in counterculture history, kicked off on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock Memories
angles.copy: 57 years since the mud and music of Woodstock began! Which iconic performance would you have loved to see live?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Death (1977)
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of the King of Rock 'n' Roll, Elvis Presley.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley, who left us 49 years ago today. His music and legacy live on.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's Death (1970)
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of the legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix.

angles.name: Hendrix Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, who passed away 56 years ago. His groundbreaking guitar work continues to inspire.

events.title: The Beatles released Abbey Road (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album, featuring that legendary zebra crossing cover, was released on this day in the UK in 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles walked across that famous zebra crossing. What's your favourite track from 'Abbey Road'?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! What's your favourite Pretenders track?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Mad Fer It Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! What's your favourite Oasis anthem he sang?

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine' single (1971)
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single on this day in the US in 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon gave us 'Imagine'. A song that still resonates today. What does it mean to you?

events.title: Apple announced the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: On this day in 2001, Apple unveiled the original iPod, revolutionising how we carry and listen to music.

angles.name: iPod Revolution
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? 25 years ago today, Apple announced the device that put '1,000 songs in your pocket' and changed music forever.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, celebrating the release of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: 007 Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From Shirley Bassey to Billie Eilish, which Bond theme song is your ultimate favourite?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. What's your favourite Beatles or solo track?

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! What's your favourite Monty Python or Fawlty Towers moment?
